title: Massive challenge for Garden Route Badgers women
description: CRICKET NEWS - The Six Gun Grill Garden...
bodyText:
CRICKET NEWS - The Six Gun Grill Garden Route Badgers Women have a tough assignment when they travel to KwaZulu-Natal this weekend. The Badgers will take on the log leaders, the Dolphins, in the Cricket South Africa Hollywoodbets Pro50 Series on Saturday 16 November, and a Pro20 Series match will be played on Sunday 17 November.

The Badgers are still trying for their first victory of the season but they will take a lot of confidence with the availability of their international players, Annerie Dercksen and Mieke de Ridder.


> Askahe Nyovane is unfortunately sidelined due to injury.


The squad for the weekend are:

Nicolien Janse van Rensburg (captain), Annerie Dercksen, Gizelle Abrahams, Jana Nell, Janè Winster, Julandi Saayman, Julia Hoal, Khayakazi Mathe, Micaéla Andrews, Mieke de Ridder, Mochelle May, Nadine Moodley and Vuyolwethu Bonya.

Mieke de Ridder of Garden Route Badgers. Photo: Ashley Vlotman/Gallo Images.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
